limitations: The $500M Thrive program cost is not AI-attributable alone — it covers severance, technology broadly, and outside services; no AI-specific dollar amount is broken out, limiting investment intensity to score 3
LenAI deployment is described with operational detail but no quantified business results (e.g., productivity gains, cost savings), capping narrative concreteness at 4
Risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific with named mechanisms but lacks quantified risk exposure or named governance oversight bodies, capping at 4
